narrative:
East Jefferson North (precinct in Mercer County) has 582 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.0 percentage points.
